name: Alfie and Archie's Dog Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Lightly oil a cookie sheet. Combine flour, powdered dry milk, salt, garlic powder, and brown sugar in a bowl. Cut in meat drippings until the mixture resembles coarse cornmeal. Mix in egg. Gradually add ice water until the dough forms a ball.
2. Using your fingers, pat the dough onto the prepared cookie sheet to form rectangles about 1/4 inch thick. Cut into squares or desired shapes using a knife or cookie cutter and remove any scraps. The scraps can be used to form additional biscuits and baked later.
3. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until lightly golden brown. Remove from the baking tray and let cool on a wire rack.
